rows.label: qev055902_MSG0001
rows.name:
I came here at the request of an Earthling.
I am aware there are many matters that cannot be solved by Earthling intellect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055902_MSG0002
rows.name:
I need biological samples from six Nalki.
I must take all possible measures to ensure I reach the correct conclusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055902_MSG0003
rows.name:
I see...
Is it time to reveal the analysis results...?[ST:wait ]
